name: HIPAA Transmission Security
description: Ensures PHI is encrypted during transmission (HIPAA 164.312(e)(2)(ii))
query: SELECT id, hostname, port, tls_enabled, phi_transmitted FROM network_endpoints WHERE phi_transmitted = true AND tls_enabled = false
remediation: Enable TLS 1.2 or higher for all endpoints transmitting PHI. Disable unencrypted protocols.
